rows.label: qev051505_MSG0001
rows.name:
I wanted to try fighting the people living in this city once,
so I borrowed the form of an Earthling and entered the tournament, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051505_MSG0002
rows.name:
To think I'd end up fighting you.
Haha! We share a strange fate, you and I![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051505_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Hm? You don't recognize me?
Well, I suppose so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051505_MSG0004
rows.name:
It would obviously be problematic to show up in a place like this
in my original form, so I just changed my appearance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051505_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Right, then if you win this match,
I'll reveal my true identity to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051505_MSG0007
rows.name:
No matter how strong you are, I won't lose easily.
Even like this, I've survived countless bloody battles
as a BLADE![ST:wait ]
